nasb.text: On another Sabbath He entered the synagogue and was teaching; and there was a man there whose right hand was withered.

esv.text: On another Sabbath, he entered the synagogue and was teaching, and a man was there whose right hand was withered.

cnv.text: 另一個安息日，耶穌進入會堂教導人，在那裡有一個人，右手枯乾，

ccb.text: 又有一个安息日，耶稣进入会堂教导人，座中有一个右手萎缩的人。

csbs.text: 在另一个安息日的时候，耶稣进了会堂教导人。那里有一个人，右手枯萎了。
